page_content:
Formerly: ENCH437.

CHBE440 Chemical Kinetics and Reactor Design (3 Credits) Fundamentals of chemical reaction kinetics and their application to

the design and operation of chemical reactors. Reaction rate theory, homogeneous reactions and catalysis electrochemical reactions. Catalytic reactor design.

Prerequisite: Minimum grade of C- in CHBE301, MATH241, and MATH246. Restriction: Must be in Engineering: Chemical program; and permission of ENGR-Chemical & Biomolecular Engineering department.

Credit Only Granted for. CHBE440 or ENCH440.
